title: Can You Escape: The Collection
description:
Can You Escape: The Collection brings together 23 classic escape room games!

Each game features puzzles, hidden objects, and riddles set in a variety of locations like gaming rooms, garages, offices, basements, and more.

Across the collection, you’ll find over 300 rooms to unlock. All escape games are available from the start, so you can jump into any adventure you choose. The gameplay is simple, puzzle-focused, and designed for quick, satisfying challenges.

A perfect collection for fans of retro escape games or newcomers curious to experience these early classics.
